events.name: Tone Updated
events.description: Fired when a tone profile is created or modified

events.name: Identity Updated
events.description: Fired when the twin's profile fields change

events.name: Memory Saved
events.description: Fired when a pending memory is approved and indexed

events.name: Interaction Recorded
events.description: Fired when a communication is logged

events.name: Voice Configured
events.description: Fired when the twin's voice profile is set or changed

metadata.summary: Speak as the user. Provides identity, per-channel tone, memory recall, and interaction tracking to any persona. The active twin is resolved automatically — no per-persona attach step needed.
